IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_REQUIRED: Header Idempotency-Key is required for this endpoint.
USER_PENALIZED: You can't post reviews or comments while you have an active penalty.
HANDLE_TAKEN: This handle is already in use.
HANDLE_INVALID_FORMAT: Handle can only contain letters, numbers and underscores (3-30 characters).
FOLLOW_REQUEST_ALREADY_SENT: You already sent a follow request to this user.
NOT_FOLLOW_REQUEST_TARGET: You can't respond to this request.
EMAIL_TAKEN: This email is already in use.
GOOGLE_NO_EMAIL: The Google account has no email.
OAUTH_ACCOUNT_NO_PASSWORD: This account uses Google Sign-In and has no password to reset.
OAUTH_ACCOUNT_EMAIL_LOCKED: This account uses Google Sign-In and can't change its email here.
SAME_EMAIL: The new email must be different from the current one.
REPORT_TARGET_NOT_FOUND: The reported content or user doesn't exist.
REACTION_NOT_FOUND: You haven't reacted to this review.
TRACK_NOT_IN_ALBUM: Track {deezerId} doesn't belong to this album.
TRACK_ITEMS_NOT_ALLOWED: trackItems can't be sent on a track review.
REVIEW_ALREADY_EXISTS: A review of this resource already exists for this user.
SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
